title: Extra Tooltips
description: Add Tooltips to items via a config file.
body:
You can add tooltips to any item (including other items from other mods) via a config file located at: config/extra_tooltips/tooltip.json

 

## Default file is structured:

![Default File Without Extra Tooltips](https://joshepstein.co.uk/fabricTooltips/before_added.png)


Adding a tooltip looks like:

![Adding extra tooltips to config](https://joshepstein.co.uk/fabricTooltips/after_added.png)


You can reload config files (When you make a change) by doing /reloadtooltips - Only in singleplayer though. If you would like to reload in multiplayer, you need to join singleplayer world and run the command, then go back to multiplayer, or, in a simpler way, relaunch your game.

The mod is only required on CLIENT.


Mod can be used in any modpacks.
